description: Current 1D thermal contract at CFD mdot.
Replace predictive air-side HX duty with CFD cooler wallHeatFlux magnitude.
Use heater interface wallHeatFlux and remove the 37 W 1D test-section source.
Use heater wallHeatFlux and treat the test section as a negative local source so internal ambient losses remain active.
Prescribe heater wallHeatFlux plus all CFD patchwise heat losses mapped to 1D parent segments.
